THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REVELO, MANUELITO $3,254.43 PRINCIPAL, $7,930.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,200.60 INTEREST, $307.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,692.03, PLUS COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF X-DEFT LEASECOMM AND AGAINST X-COMPLAINANT REVELO. REVELO TO TAKE NOTHING ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT AND SAID CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. X-DEFT LEASECOMM TO RECOVER IT'S COSTS AND REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES HEREIN.
